roa.docketEntryComment: MOT TO DECLARE CONFLICT FILED BY PD

/CAL:COMPLETION OF SENTENCE AND JOIN #10003736/X:ATTORNEY, MICHAEL GAINES,IS SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD,/X:THE COURT RECEIVED ALETTER FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILATION, DATED 01-21-10, INDICATING THAT THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT EXCESS THE TERM IMPOSED BY THE COURT ON 08-18-09/X:ON 04-09-10 THE COURT REMANDED THE DEFENDANT NUNC PRO TUNC TO 02-03-10,/CTORD:THE PREVIOUS ABSTRACT AMENDED FOR THE DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE 73 ADDITIONAL CREDITS IN ADDITION TO THE CREDITS GIVEN ON 08-18-09, CREDITS ARE AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 134 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 66 DAYS SAGE FOR TIME SPENT IN COUNTY JAIL, PLUS ADDITIONAL 336 DAYS OF TIME SPENT IN YGC, FOR A TOTAL OF  536 DAYS,/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2//PARDATE:UPON RELEASE FROM THE MATTER IS CASE #10003736/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:SP 16M:L/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 61 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, PLUS 336 DAYS OF TIME SPENT IN YGC, 30 DAYS SAGEFOR A TOTAL OF 427 DAYS,/DNACOMP/STATES/SECFEE/ICNA/VF5:200/PAR/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:08-19-09/PAR70/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/AMEND:1, TO REFLECT 12021(E)(1) PC, A FELONY, ANDTHE PRIORALLEGATION WAS SUSTAINED IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AND NOT SOLANO COUNTY/ /FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G//ADPRS1:ALLEGATION WITHIN COUNT 1, ASSAULT WITH FORCE LIKELY TO CAUSE GREATBODILY INJURY, 245(A)(1), A FELONY/DEFT ADV RTS:1/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-18-09/REMA/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/

/CAL:MOTION TO DECLARE CONFLICT COUNSEL/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:DAVID WILTON/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER, NIKI SOLIS, IS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL,/NTW/LD:07-15-09/X:THE PRELIMINARYHEARING OF 07-14-09 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:07-15-09/987,2/BAIL:75,000/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING /DOP/
/CAL:CORRECTION & CLARIFICATION OF CTS/NUNC:THE DEFENDANT IS REMANDED/NUNCDAT:02-03-10/CONTD:COMPLETION OF SP SENTENCE & JOIN 10003736/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE/MO GRTD/NTW60/LD:08-31-09/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
